headline: Napkin Investment: CTS Eventim - Quality Name At A Discount
summary: CTS Eventim trades at a steep discount to Live Nation despite superior fundamentals and recent insider buying. Find out why CEVMF stock is a strong buy.

headline: Nvidia, Citigroup, Live Nation And A Real Estate Stock: CNBC’s ‘Final Trades’
summary: CBRE Group shares rose 0.8% to close at $141.06 on Thursday while Nvidia shares fell 0.7% to settle at $202.78 during the session.
